name: 5'x7' Multi Check Rectangular Woven Indoor and Outdoor Area Rugs Blue - Threshold™
description:
Transform your indoor or outdoor decor with this Multi Check Rectangular Woven Area Rug from Threshold™. This rug features a multicolor pattern of assorted-size checks in brown, off-white, light blue and dark blue, adding a modern pop of color and style to your flooring. Designed with a flat-pile construction, it’s a great choice for high-traffic areas. Plus, it can be easily cleaned with a hose for effortless upkeep.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
